verses.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنكَرِ
verses.translation: Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing

verses.arabic: وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ طَرَفَيِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِّنَ اللَّيْلِ
verses.translation: And establish prayer at the two ends of the day and at the approach of the night
Maintain with care the [obligatory] prayers and [in particular] the middle prayer
And seek help through patience and prayer

verses.arabic: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ
verses.translation: And when My servants ask you concerning Me, indeed I am near

verses.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me

verses.arabic: وَاذْكُر رَّبَّكَ فِي نَفْسِكَ تَضَرُّعًا وَخِيفَةً
verses.translation: And remember your Lord within yourself in humility and in fear
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest

hadith.translation: Prayer is the pillar of religion

hadith.arabic: أَوَّلُ مَا يُحَاسَبُ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ مِنْ عَمَلِهِ صَلَاتُهُ
hadith.translation: The first thing a person will be questioned about on the Day of Judgment is their prayer

hadith.arabic: مَنْ صَلَّى الْفَجْرَ فَهُوَ فِي ذِمَّةِ اللَّهِ
hadith.translation: Whoever prays Fajr is under the protection of Allah

dhikr.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him
There is no god but Allah

dhikr.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
dhikr.translation: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad
I seek forgiveness from Allah, the Most Great
All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds

dhikr.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
dhikr.translation: There is no power except with Allah

fajr.arabic: صَلَاةُ الْفَجْرِ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا وَمَا فِيهَا
fajr.translation: The Fajr prayer is better than the world and all that is in it

dhuhr.translation: Whoever prays during the two cool periods will enter Paradise

asr.arabic: مَنْ تَرَكَ صَلَاةَ الْعَصْرِ فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهُ
asr.translation: Whoever abandons Asr prayer, their deeds become worthless

maghrib.translation: Maghrib is the evening meal time of the Arabs

isha.arabic: مَنْ صَلَّى الْعِشَاءَ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ فَكَأَنَّمَا قَامَ نِصْفَ اللَّيْلِ
isha.translation: Whoever prays Isha in congregation, it's as if they prayed half the night
